query:
CREATE TABLE `assessments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`participantId` int NOT NULL,
	`assessmentType` enum('self','observation') NOT NULL,
	`assessorName` varchar(128),
	`assessorRole` varchar(64),
	`period` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026',
	`status` enum('draft','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `assessments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `competency_scores` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`assessmentId` int NOT NULL,
	`competencyKey` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`score` int NOT NULL,
	`behavioralEvidence` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `competency_scores_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `participants` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`participantCode` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`fullName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`department` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`position` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`mentorName` varchar(128),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`joinDate` varchar(32),
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `participants_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `participants_participantCode_unique` UNIQUE(`participantCode`)
);

CREATE TABLE `sbi_feedback` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`assessmentId` int NOT NULL,
	`competencyKey` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`situation` text,
	`behavior` text,
	`impact` text,
	`actionPlan` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `sbi_feedback_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
